name: scanned_fallback_benchmark
description: Synthetic image-only fixtures for deterministic OCR stress testing. Auto-route steps test routing behavior; strict Tesseract and preprocessing steps are forced-engine diagnostics. This corpus does not substitute for physically scanned or photographed documents.
corpus_note: Synthetic fixtures are rendered from known text and transformed with deterministic image degradation. Use real_routing_manifest.json for claims about real scans, photographs, handwriting, photocopies, or signed documents.
